mapper.select: SELECT user_id, thing_id, SUM(LEAST(CAST(browse_duration AS UNSIGNED),3600)/3600) /* max 1 */ + COUNT(DISTINCT o.id)*2 AS weight FROM b_user_thing_history h LEFT JOIN b_order o ON h.user_id = o.user_id AND h.thing_id = o.thing_id GROUP BY user_id, thing_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_similarity (thing_id, neighbor_id, similarity) VALUES
(#{sim.thingId}, #{sim.neighborId}, #{sim.similarity})
